channel.title: Comments for page "Jam Jars"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Jam Jars"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's not that it's forbidden; it's just that I put so much time into making the music and feel so proud of the music that I've made that having it summed up to "hurr brony" almost feels insulting, even if you didn't mean it like that. <3

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I thought we were at a point where bronies were no longer verboten on this site. My apologies, I guess it was just a badly-aimed joke.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ed & Al's Alchemist Emporium

….Okay then. +1 for the reference.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The title and feel of the "Utterly Bazaar" was fantastic.

Also, butt ghost is best ghost.

Kudos TG for another enjoyable tale.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm not a brony, Finnegan is not a brony. Please do not do this to TwistedGears and I. It kills us inside.

you're more than welcome to listen to my music or buy it though <3

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I love "Utterly Bazaar". The rest is somewhat less compelling (I actually forgot who this was until Aldon was mentioned), but I upvoted for Finnegan vs. Butt Ghost.

But small bundle of spending money

A couple ways to fix this, so I didn't do it myself.

Also, >tfw Finnegan is a brony. I was gonna be all "how haven't I heard of this guy?" but then SLURPG.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I enjoy this tale, for reasons beyond promotion. Things are really starting to get on a roll here as well, and Finnegan, as always, is a joy to read.

item.title: Now Playing Second Track
item.content:encoded:
This actually had a lot more work on it than Involuntary Isolation, I really struggled with the kind of tone I should go for. Think this worked out pretty well. Many thanks to djkaktus, Decibelle, the late Kalinin-senpai, Conwell, Goomy/Ooze and likely a host of others.

+ References!
- Hide references
  • I originally had a different bandcamp link planned for the playlist but extremely unfortunate circumstances has delayed the project. Another day, another tale.
  • I like referencing other tales, not just skips, and so I dropped a quick shoutout to an underappreciated series by Ooze, starting with A Circus Milked Dry.
  • (Also vague references to FMA whoo)
  • Did I tell you I like referencing skips? I link them too, sometimes. Diet Ghost is one of those sometimes. Fit too well with the next reference-
  • the butt ghost!!! Yes, I did it. Deal with it.
  • There's the anart mecha, which showed up in Anart Antics.
  • The indistinct image of the Wanderer's Library is a reference to SCP-268, which will be later explained a bit.
  • That might be it? Idk, whatever.
